summary: Master 英検 completely (all 7 grades, all skills, scoring, 2024 reform, market) + audit our content gaps → a 英検-pass-specialist build plan
logs: 4 experts mastering 英検 (spec, market, pass-efficacy, our gaps) from primary sources…
Synthesizing the 英検-specialist spec + gap plan from 4 masters…

result.eikenReference:
CURRENT 英検 SPEC (post-2024 reform + 2025 新設 準2級プラス) — verified eiken.or.jp + 旺文社英語の友/ESLclub, accessed 2026-06-06.

GRADES NOW: 5級・4級・3級・準2級・準2級プラス・2級・準1級・1級 (8 grades; 準2級プラス first held 2025-05, first new grade in 31 yrs).

PER-GRADE STRUCTURE / 一次 大問:
• 5級 (CEFR A1, vocab ~600): 筆記25分 — 大問1 語句空所15 / 大問2 会話文5 / 大問3 語句整序5 = 25問. NO writing. Listening ~20分 第1部10/第2部5/第3部10=25. Speaking=録音式 約3分, 別判定(一次に非算入).
• 4級 (A1, ~1,300): 筆記35分 — 大問1 15/大問2 5/大問3 整序5/大問4 長文10 = 35問. NO writing. Listening ~30分 3部構成. Speaking=録音式 約4分, 別判定.
• 3級 (A1-A2, ~2,100): 2024で50→65分. 大問1 15/大問2 5/大問3 長文10 + WRITING 2題: Eメール(15-25語) + 意見論述. Listening 3部=30問. 二次 約5分: 音読(~30語)+No.1パッセージ質問+No.2/3イラスト+No.4/5受験者自身=5問+attitude (33点満点, 合格≈19).
• 準2級 (A2, ~3,600): 2024で75→80分. Reading 37→29問(大問1 5問削減, 大問3B 3問削減) + WRITING 2題: Eメール(40-50語) + 意見論述. Listening 2部構成. 二次 約6分: イラスト2枚, 黙読20秒→音読, 5問. (二次合格率 ~80%, ここで二次が落とし始める).
• 準2級プラス (A2上-B1, 2025新設): 筆記85分 — Reading ~28-31問 + WRITING 2題: 要約 + 意見論述. Listening ~25分 第1部15/第2部15=30. 二次 約7分.
• 2級 (A2-B1, ~5,000): 筆記85分. Reading 38→31問: 大問1 17/大問2 長文空所A3+B3=6/大問3 内容一致8 + WRITING 2題: 要約(45-55語) + 意見論述. Listening 第1部15/第2部15=30. 二次 約7分: No.1パッセージ/No.2イラスト展開(考慮20秒)/No.3カード意見/No.4一般意見.
• 準1級 (B2, ~7,500): 筆記100分. Reading 41→31問: 大問1 18/大問2 長文空所/大問3 内容一致 + WRITING 2題: 要約(60-70語) + 意見論述. Listening ~30分. 二次 約8分: 自由会話→4コマナレーション(~2分)→No.1-4質問.

WRITING TASK MAP: Eメール=3級/準2級. 要約=準2級プラス/2級/準1級/1級. 意見論述=3級〜1級 全級(2題目). 評価観点: Eメール=内容/語彙/文法(3観点); 要約・論述=内容/構成/語彙/文法(4観点); 各観点×4点.

CSE スコア (満点 / 一次合格 / 二次合格): 5級 850/419(一次のみ) / 4級 1000/622(一次のみ) / 3級 2200/合格1456(一次1103+二次353) / 準2級 2400/1728(1322+406) / 準2級プラス 2500/1829(1402+427) / 2級 2600/1980(1520+460) / 準1級 3000/2304(1792+512). 技能別満点(各技能均等配分): 準1級750/2級650/準2級プラス625/準2級600/3級550/4級500/5級425. KEY RULE: post-2024 CSE配点は技能均等 — Reading満点でWriting/Speaking 0点では合格不可 (旧raw配点では可能だった). 一技能が極端に低いと一次落ち.

GRAMMAR LADDER (易→難): 5級=be/一般動詞現在,三単現,現在進行,can,命令文,複数,WH疑問. 4級=過去/過去進行,will/be going to,不定詞,動名詞,比較,接続詞,There is. 3級=現在完了,受動態,不定詞形容詞用法,間接疑問,関係代名詞,分詞形容詞用法. 準2級=過去完了,関係副詞,使役/知覚動詞,仮定法過去基礎,分詞構文基礎. 準2級プラス/2級=仮定法,分詞構文,強調構文,倒置,無生物主語,抽象語彙. 準1級=仮定法全般,高度な倒置/省略,コロケーション/句動詞,アカデミック語彙~7,500,パラフレーズ.
result.marketVerdict: CONFIRMED — CEO's「英検 stays hot」thesis is quantitatively validated. (1) Huge & durable: ~4,489,999 英検 applicants FY2024 (≈4.5M, plateaued after +22% 2020→2023), and A-KEN's exact demo grows fastest — 小学生 375,991 (1.5×/10yr), 高校生 1,331,710 (1.8×), 高校生準1級 198,863 (≈8×/10yr): acquisition moving DOWN in age, UP in grade across the whole 5級→準1級 ladder. (2) Non-discretionary demand = the moat: 517 universities use 英検 in 2025入試; in 2024一般選抜 462 universities (60.6%) used an external English test and 90.0% of those students chose 英検 — it's admissions currency, not "nice to have." (3) Two vacuums to seize NOW: スタディサプリ ENGLISH for KIDS exits 2026-06-30 (premium kids-English WITHOUT exam-pass thesis abandoned) and the OFFICIAL companion スタディギア for EIKEN already died 2024-03 — no kids-focused, game-wrapped, exam-pass product occupies the open quadrant (kids 6-15 × reliably-passes × narrative game × adaptive-SRS × parent-visibility); mikan=adults/vocab, 英語の友=books. The 3×/yr cadence (2025: 6/1, 10/5, 1/25) + near-monthly S-CBT + 準会場 windows = recurring deadlines that justify the ¥1,480/mo subscription + power the FSRS/streak spine.

gapRanked.gap: Vocab DB distractors 100% corrupted — all 10,531 items (5級600..準1級4,500) carry JAPANESE distractors (verified: cat → [いぬ,さかな,とり]). vocab_grammar_practice_screen builds the 大問1 cloze as [word.word, ...distractors], rendering an ENGLISH target against 3 JAPANESE options → trivially answerable at EVERY grade. This is the exact failure the content-qa gate exists to stop. The one item type that IS wired is broken.
gapRanked.fix: Regenerate all 10,531 distractors as same-POS, grade-appropriate ENGLISH words via the content-qa subagent gate; AND redesign the item from a recall-cloze (blank the noun in its own example) to a real 英検 大問1 grammar/collocation/idiom cloze where all 4 English options are plausible same-POS. Add a CI assertion: 0 distractors may contain [ぁ-んァ-ヴ一-龠].

gapRanked.gap: LISTENING = 0. Listening is ~33-50% of every 3級+ score (3級 30Q, 準2級プラス/2級 15+15=30Q). ExamSectionType.listening exists but NO grade config has a listening section; exam_practice_screen routes it to '準備中です'. Zero audio items, zero infra. Pass-prediction is meaningless without it.
gapRanked.fix: Build audio item schema (第1部 応答選択/第2部 会話内容一致/第3部 文・イラスト内容一致), generate clips via existing Kokoro TTS pipeline, wire ExamSectionType.listening to a real player+4-choice screen. Seed each grade with the verified counts.

gapRanked.gap: WRITING = 0 implemented — the 2024 reform's defining addition is entirely absent. Config DEFINES writing sections but exam_practice_screen routes writing to '準備中です'. No essay editor, no 要約/Eメール tasks, no rubric, no AI grading. Writing is ~1/3 of CSE at 3級+ and the cheapest CSE points to gain (mechanical rubric).
gapRanked.fix: Build a writing editor + Claude-graded rubric against official 観点: Eメール(3級15-25/準2級40-50語; check BOTH underlined questions answered, word count, opening line; 内容/語彙/文法) and 要約(準2級プラス/2級45-55/準1級60-70語; main-points coverage, no verbatim copying; 内容/構成/語彙/文法). This is the clearest premium-justifying, mikan-beating, スタサプ-killing differentiator.

gapRanked.gap: 二次試験 SPEAKING = 0 (voice/ is a demo pronunciation stub). 3級+ pass REQUIRES a separately-failed 二次 stage; 準2級 二次 pass-rate ~80% is where kids first fail, mostly from silence. Without 二次 the product literally cannot claim to make a kid PASS.
gapRanked.fix: Build grade-specific record-and-respond 二次 simulators leveraging speech_to_text (T02, already added) + Claude: 音読 scoring → No.1-5/イラスト展開/4コマナレーション per grade → アティチュード 'never go silent, just try' coach (attitude is 3pts and rescues weak-grammar kids).

gapRanked.gap: No CSE per-skill model, no mock-exam assembly, no 合格率 prediction, no per-大問 weakness analytics — yet the sole KPI is 'passes 英検'. App tracks '% correct overall', not per-skill CSE, so it cannot name the LIMITING skill (the #1 reason kids fail under均等-CSE rules).
gapRanked.fix: Build a per-skill CSE estimator + a full timed 一次 mock in real 大問 proportions (e.g. 2級 R31+W2+L30) that outputs a 合格率 vs the FIXED 合格基準 (2級一次1520/満点2600≈77%) and routes the kid to the weakest skill. Pace FSRS to the limiting skill + the 3×/yr 試験日 countdown. Parent dashboard frames progress as 'predicted 合格 for 第N回'.

gapRanked.gap: Item banks are DEMO-sized, not prep banks: ~18 reading passages and 16 word-ordering problems TOTAL across all grades, hard-coded; ~20 quest nodes/grade ≈ one 大問1's worth. Exhausted in one sitting, never regenerate — cannot support repeated mock attempts.
gapRanked.fix: Scale to dozens of fresh-form items per 大問 per grade (generated via content-qa-gated pipeline), pooled for re-attempts. Deepen the high-volume, high-anxiety 'cliff' grades 協会 itself flagged: 3級/準2級/準2級プラス/2級 (準2級→2級 takes ~2yr vs ~1yr others).

gapRanked.gap: Spec source-of-truth is stale/incomplete: 準2級プラス (2025-new, 要約-bearing) has a quest town but is ABSENT from kEikenExams; no config carries Listening or 二次 counts; question counts predate verification.
gapRanked.fix: Add 準2級プラス to kEikenExams; add Listening + Writing + Speaking section defs with the verified 2025-26 counts per grade so every screen can be built against an accurate, current spec. First-mover edge: no incumbent has mature 準2級プラス content.

gapRanked.gap: Existing quest nodes labeled 'Writing Eメール' (quest_data.dart ~1168,1475) and '二次面接 イラスト描写' (~1198) are 4-choice MCQ awareness items — they teach ABOUT writing/speaking but produce no learner output and no grading. Mislabeled as practice.
gapRanked.fix: Re-label honestly as awareness/intro nodes; route the actual productive practice to the new Writing/Speaking engines so the retention spine and the pass-machinery are not conflated.

topPriorities: 1. UNBLOCK 大問1 (1-2 days): regenerate all 10,531 vocab distractors as same-POS English via the content-qa gate + add anti-Japanese CI assertion, and convert the recall-cloze into a real 英検 grammar/collocation cloze. This is the only wired item type and it is currently broken — fix before anything else.

2. BUILD WRITING ENGINE (highest ROI for the pass KPI): Claude-graded Eメール (3級/準2級) + 要約 (準2級プラス/2級/準1級) on the official 観点. Absent today, ~1/3 of CSE, cheapest points to gain, and the single most defensible AI-graded differentiator vs mikan/英語の友 — this is precisely the thesis スタサプKIDS lacked.

3. BUILD LISTENING (~half the score, 0 today): audio item schema + 第1部/2部/3部 items generated via existing Kokoro TTS, wired to a real player screen. Pass-prediction is meaningless until listening exists.

4. BUILD CSE PER-SKILL MODEL + FULL TIMED MOCK → 合格率 PREDICTION naming the limiting skill, scored vs the fixed 合格基準. This operationalizes the sole KPI and reframes the parent dashboard as 'predicted 合格 for 第N回'.
5. BUILD 二次 SPEAKING SIMULATOR (record-and-respond + アティチュード 'never go silent' coach via speech_to_text+Claude), per-grade. Required for any 3級+ pass claim; 準2級 二次 is where kids first fail.

6. SCALE DEMO BANKS → PREP BANKS (dozens of fresh-form items/大問/grade, content-qa-gated), deepest on the cliff grades 3級/準2級/準2級プラス/2級; add 準2級プラス to kEikenExams and fix the spec source-of-truth with verified 2025-26 counts.
result.shellServesPass: The Layton + Duolingo shell is the RETENTION/ADHERENCE spine that gets a 6-15yo to do enough reps to actually pass — but it must wrap the exam-pass machinery, not replace it. (a) Layton-style コトバ探偵 painted adventure: every 英検 item is delivered as a ナゾ thrown by an NPC, which makes the hardest, most-skipped item types (grammar cloze, 要約, 二次 Q&A) feel like solving a mystery rather than drilling — critical because kids fail on the skills they avoid practicing (writing/speaking). Story progression should map 1:1 to the grade ladder and to 大問 coverage so 'finishing the town' = 'covered every section of that grade'. (b) Duolingo-style async spine — streak + FSRS spaced review + parent dashboard, explicitly NO gacha/PvP — converts the 3×/yr cadence into daily habit: the streak and FSRS pacing are aimed at the 試験日 countdown (第1回 6/1, 第2回 10/5, 第3回 1/25), and FSRS targets the CSE-LIMITING skill, not just vocab, so daily play actively closes the gap that decides pass/fail. (c) The parent dashboard is the willingness-to-pay engine: it must surface 'predicted 合格 for the next sitting' and 'weakest skill blocking the pass', matching the parent's own 3×/yr mental model and justifying ¥1,480/mo against a concrete admissions outcome. Net: the shell is the delivery+retention layer; the moat is the writing/listening/二次/mock+合格予測 engine it carries. The shell makes kids show up; the CSE machinery makes them pass.
